message:
feat(mcp,cli,tui): MCP audit recording, query suggestions, and timeline (wa-nu4.3.1.6)

MCP Audit Recording:
- AuditedToolHandler wraps all wa.* MCP tools for automatic audit logging
- Records: tool name, redacted args, success/failure, error codes, elapsed time
- Audit action IDs propagated to injection metadata for traceability
- Covers all tools: search, events, reserve, send, workflow_run, accounts

CLI Enhancements:
- wa search --suggest: inline completion suggestions without executing search
- wa timeline: unified event timeline with cross-pane correlation and
  time range filtering for debugging multi-pane workflows

Output & TUI:
- SearchSuggestRenderer for rendering query suggestions in human/JSON format
- ViewState.search_suggestions for inline suggestions in search view
- Dynamic TUI layout adjustment (3→4 zones when suggestions are shown)
- Real-time suggestion display while typing in search mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
